-- See Hoogle, http://www.haskell.org/hoogle/


@package plutarch-ledger-api
@version 3.6.0


-- | This module is designed to be imported qualified, as many of its
--   identifiers clash with the Plutarch prelude.
module Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap
data PSortedMap (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S)

newtype PUnsortedMap (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PUnsortedMap :: Term s (PAssocMap k v) -> PUnsortedMap (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S)

newtype PAssocMap (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PAssocMap :: Term s (PBuiltinList (PBuiltinPair (PAsData k) (PAsData v))) -> PAssocMap (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
data MergeHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type)
MergeHandler :: BothPresentHandler s k a b c -> OnePresentHandler s k a c -> OnePresentHandler s k b c -> MergeHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type)
[mhBothPresent] :: MergeHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type) -> BothPresentHandler s k a b c
[mhLeftPresent] :: MergeHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type) -> OnePresentHandler s k a c
[mhRightPresent] :: MergeHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type) -> OnePresentHandler s k b c
data BothPresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type)
DropBoth :: BothPresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type)
HandleBoth :: Term s (k :--> (a :--> (b :--> c))) -> BothPresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type)
HandleOrDropBoth :: Term s (k :--> (a :--> (b :--> PMaybe c))) -> BothPresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type)
data OnePresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type)
DropOne :: OnePresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type)
HandleOne :: Term s (k :--> (a :--> b)) -> OnePresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type)
HandleOrDropOne :: Term s (k :--> (a :--> PMaybe b)) -> OnePresentHandler (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type)

-- | Construct an empty map.
pempty :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PInner (t k v) ~ PAssocMap k v => Term s (t k v)

-- | Construct a singleton map with the given key and value.
psingleton :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k v) ~ PAssocMap k v, PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s (k :--> (v :--> t k v))

-- | Construct a singleton map with the given data-encoded key and value.
psingletonData :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PInner (t k v) ~ PAssocMap k v => Term s (PAsData k :--> (PAsData v :--> t k v))

punsortedMapFromFoldable :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) f (s :: S). (Foldable f, PIsData k, PIsData v) => f (Term s k, Term s v) -> Term s (PUnsortedMap k v)

psortedMapFromFoldable :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) f (s :: S). (Foldable f, POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData v) => f (Term s k, Term s v) -> Term s (PSortedMap k v)

-- | Attempt to promote <a>PUnsortedMap</a> to <a>PSortedMap</a>. This
--   function checks that the keys in the input map are in strictly
--   ascending order and fails with an error if they are not. Duplicate
--   keys are not allowed.

-- | <i>Deprecated: Use ppromoteToSortedMap instead</i>
passertSorted :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k) => Term s (PUnsortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v)

-- | Attempt to promote <a>PUnsortedMap</a> to <a>PSortedMap</a>. This
--   function checks that the keys in the input map are in strictly
--   ascending order and fails with an error if they are not. Duplicate
--   keys are not allowed.
ppromoteToSortedMap :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k) => Term s (PUnsortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v)

-- | Coerce <a>PUnsortedMap</a> to <a>PSortedMap</a>. Unsafe.
punsafeCoerceToSortedMap :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PUnsortedMap k v) -> Term s (PSortedMap k v)

-- | Forget the knowledge that keys were sorted.
pforgetSorted :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PSortedMap k v) -> Term s (PUnsortedMap k v)

-- | Applies a function to every value in the map, much like <a>map</a>.
pmap :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k a) ~ PAssocMap k a, PInner (t k b) ~ PAssocMap k b, PIsData a, PIsData b) => Term s ((a :--> b) :--> (t k a :--> t k b))

-- | As <a>pmap</a>, but over Data representations.
pmapData :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k a) ~ PAssocMap k a, PInner (t k b) ~ PAssocMap k b) => Term s ((PAsData a :--> PAsData b) :--> (t k a :--> t k b))

-- | As <a>pmap</a>, but gives key access as well.
pmapWithKey :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k a) ~ PAssocMap k a, PInner (t k b) ~ PAssocMap k b, PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b) => Term s ((k :--> (a :--> b)) :--> (t k a :--> t k b))

-- | Maps and filters the map, much like <a>mapMaybe</a>.
pmapMaybe :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k a) ~ PAssocMap k a, PInner (t k b) ~ PAssocMap k b, PIsData a, PIsData b) => Term s ((a :--> PMaybe b) :--> (t k a :--> t k b))

-- | As <a>pmapMaybe</a>, but over Data representation.
pmapMaybeData :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k a) ~ PAssocMap k a, PInner (t k b) ~ PAssocMap k b) => Term s ((PAsData a :--> PMaybe (PAsData b)) :--> (t k a :--> t k b))

-- | As <a>pmapMaybe</a>, but gives key access as well.
pmapMaybeWithKey :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k a) ~ PAssocMap k a, PInner (t k b) ~ PAssocMap k b, PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b) => Term s ((k :--> (a :--> PMaybe b)) :--> (t k a :--> t k b))

-- | As <a>pmapMaybeData</a>, but gives key access as well.
pmapMaybeDataWithKey :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k a) ~ PAssocMap k a, PInner (t k b) ~ PAssocMap k b) => Term s ((PAsData k :--> (PAsData a :--> PMaybe (PAsData b))) :--> (t k a :--> t k b))

-- | Given a comparison function and a "zero" value, check whether a binary
--   relation holds over two <a>PSortedMap</a>s.
--   
--   <h1>Important note</h1>
--   
--   This is primarily intended to be used with <tt>PValue</tt>. We assume
--   that the comparison behaves like a comparison would (thus, being at
--   least a partial order, or possibly a total order or equivalence), and
--   that the starting value does not break it. Use with extreme care.
pcheckBinRel :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s ((v :--> (v :--> PBool)) :--> (v :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PBool))))

-- | Gives <a>PTrue</a> if both argument <a>PSortedMap</a>s contain
--   mappings for exactly the same set of keys. Requires a number of
--   equality comparisons between keys proportional to the length of the
--   shorter argument.
pkeysEqual :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PEq k, PIsData k) => Term s (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PBool))

-- | As <a>pkeysEqual</a>, but requires only <a>PEq</a> constraints for the
--   keys, and works for <a>PUnsortedMap</a>s. This requires a number of
--   equality comparisons between keys proportional to the product of the
--   lengths of both arguments: that is, this function is quadratic.
--   
--   <h1>NOTE</h1>
--   
--   This function does not handle duplicate keys in unsorted maps. For
--   example, if one map contains duplicate keys while the other does not,
--   the function may still return <a>PTrue</a> as long as each key appears
--   at least once in both maps.
--   
--   Use with caution - or preferably avoid using this function entirely -
--   as it may be deprecated in a future release due to its non-obvious
--   behavior.
pkeysEqualUnsorted :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b) => Term s (PUnsortedMap k a :--> (PUnsortedMap k b :--> PBool))

-- | Verifies all values in the map satisfy the given predicate.
pall :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData v => Term s ((v :--> PBool) :--> (PUnsortedMap k v :--> PBool))

-- | Tests if any value in the map satisfies the given predicate.
pany :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData v => Term s ((v :--> PBool) :--> (PUnsortedMap k v :--> PBool))

-- | Project all key-value pairs into a <a>Monoid</a>, then combine. Keys
--   and values will be presented in key order.
pfoldMapWithKey :: forall (m :: S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, PIsData v, forall (s' :: S). () => Monoid (Term s' m)) => Term s ((k :--> (v :--> m)) :--> (PUnsortedMap k v :--> m))

-- | Left-associative fold with keys. Keys and values will be presented in
--   key order.
pfoldlWithKey :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s ((a :--> (k :--> (v :--> a))) :--> (a :--> (PUnsortedMap k v :--> a)))

-- | Build a function that zips two <a>PSortedMap</a>s together using a
--   custom <a>MergeHandler</a>.
--   
--   The provided <a>MergeHandler</a> determines how to merge entries based
--   on whether a key is present in the left map, the right map, or both.
--   
--   <h1>NOTE</h1>
--   
--   This function itself cannot be hoisted with <a>phoistAcyclic</a>
--   because it depends on the supplied <a>MergeHandler</a>. However, once
--   you specialize it by providing a specific merge handler, the resulting
--   function <i>should</i> be hoisted if it will be reused, to avoid
--   duplication.
zipWithBuilder :: forall (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b, PIsData c) => MergeHandler s k a b c -> Term s (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PSortedMap k c))

-- | Build a function that zips two <a>PSortedMap</a>s together using a
--   custom <a>MergeHandler</a>.
--   
--   The provided <a>MergeHandler</a> determines how to merge entries based
--   on whether a key is present in the left map, the right map, or both.
--   
--   Unlike <a>zipWithBuilder</a>, <a>zipWithDataBuilder</a> operates on
--   values wrapped in <a>PAsData</a> (typed BuiltinData).
--   
--   <h1>NOTE</h1>
--   
--   This function itself cannot be hoisted with <a>phoistAcyclic</a>
--   because it depends on the supplied <a>MergeHandler</a>. However, once
--   you specialize it by providing a specific merge handler, the resulting
--   function <i>should</i> be hoisted if it will be reused, to avoid
--   duplication.
zipWithDataBuilder :: forall (s :: S) (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type). (POrd k, PIsData k) => MergeHandler s (PAsData k) (PAsData a) (PAsData b) (PAsData c) -> Term s (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PSortedMap k c))

-- | Build the union of two <a>PSortedMap</a>s, merging values that share
--   the same key using the given function.
punionWith :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s ((v :--> (v :--> v)) :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v)))

-- | Build the union of two <a>PSortedMap</a>s, merging values that share
--   the same key using the given function.
punionWithData :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k) => Term s ((PAsData v :--> (PAsData v :--> PAsData v)) :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v)))

-- | Build the union of two <a>PSortedMap</a>s. Take the value from the
--   left argument for colliding keys.
pleftBiasedUnion :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s (PSortedMap k v :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v))
pdifference :: forall (b :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b) => Term s (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PSortedMap k a))
pdifferenceWith :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b) => Term s ((a :--> (b :--> PMaybe a)) :--> (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PSortedMap k a)))

-- | Zip two <a>PSortedMap</a>s, using the given value merge function for
--   key collisions, and different values for the sides.
pzipWithDefaults :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b, PIsData c) => (forall (s' :: S). () => Term s' a) -> (forall (s' :: S). () => Term s' b) -> Term s ((a :--> (b :--> c)) :--> (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PSortedMap k c)))

-- | Build the intersection of two <a>PSortedMap</a>s, merging values that
--   share the same key using the given function.
pintersectionWith :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData a, PIsData b, PIsData c) => Term s ((a :--> (b :--> c)) :--> (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PSortedMap k c)))

-- | Build the intersection of two <a>PSortedMap</a>s, merging data-encoded
--   values that share the same key using the given function.
pintersectionWithData :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (c :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k) => Term s ((PAsData a :--> (PAsData b :--> PAsData c)) :--> (PSortedMap k a :--> (PSortedMap k b :--> PSortedMap k c)))

-- | Tests whether the map is empty.
pnull :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PUnsortedMap k v :--> PBool)

-- | Look up the given key in a <a>PSortedMap</a>.
plookup :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s (k :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PMaybe v))

-- | As <a>plookup</a>, except over Data representation.
plookupData :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PAsData k :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PMaybe (PAsData v)))

-- | Look up the given key data in a <a>PSortedMap</a>, applying the given
--   function to the found key-value pair.
plookupDataWith :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (x :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s ((PBuiltinPair (PAsData k) (PAsData v) :--> PMaybe x) :--> (PAsData k :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PMaybe x)))

-- | Look up the given key in a <a>PSortedMap</a>, returning the default
--   value if the key is absent.
pfindWithDefault :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s (v :--> (k :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> v)))

-- | Look up the given key in a <a>PSortedMap</a>; return the default if
--   the key is absent or apply the argument function to the value data if
--   present.
pfoldAt :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (r :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData k => Term s (k :--> (r :--> ((PAsData v :--> r) :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> r))))

-- | Look up the given key data in a <a>PSortedMap</a>; return the default
--   if the key is absent or apply the argument function to the value data
--   if present.
pfoldAtData :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (r :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PAsData k :--> (r :--> ((PAsData v :--> r) :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> r))))

-- | As <a>plookup</a>, but errors when the key is missing.
ptryLookup :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s (k :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> v))

-- | Insert a new key/value pair into the map, overriding the previous if
--   any.
pinsert :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k, PIsData v) => Term s (k :--> (v :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v)))

-- | Delete a key from the map.
pdelete :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd k, PIsData k) => Term s (k :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v))

-- | Given an 'updater' and a key, if the key exists in the <tt>PMap</tt>,
--   apply the 'updater' to it, otherwise do nothing. If the 'updater'
--   produces <a>PNothing</a>, the value is deleted; otherwise, it is
--   modified to the result.
--   
--   Performance will be equivalent to a lookup followed by an insert (or
--   delete), as well as the cost of calling the 'updater'.
pupdate :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, PIsData v, POrd k) => Term s ((v :--> PMaybe v) :--> (k :--> (PSortedMap k v :--> PSortedMap k v)))

-- | If a value exists at the specified key, apply the function argument to
--   it; otherwise, do nothing.
padjust :: forall (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k v) ~ PAssocMap k v, PIsData k, PEq k, PIsData v) => Term s ((v :--> v) :--> (k :--> (t k v :--> t k v)))

-- | Get the key of a key-value pair.
pkvPairKey :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData k => Term s (PBuiltinPair (PAsData k) (PAsData v) :--> k)

-- | Get the value of a key-value pair.
pkvPairValue :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData v => Term s (PBuiltinPair (PAsData k) (PAsData v) :--> v)

-- | Compare two key-value pairs by their keys. Gives <a>PTrue</a> if the
--   key of the first argument pair is less than the key of the second
--   argument pair.
pkvPairLt :: forall (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData k, POrd k) => Term s (PBuiltinPair (PAsData k) (PAsData v) :--> (PBuiltinPair (PAsData k) (PAsData v) :--> PBool))

-- | Extract the keys from the given <tt>PIsAssocMap</tt> instance as a
--   list-like structure. If the provided Map is <a>PSortedMap</a>, the
--   keys will maintain that order, and will be unique; otherwise, the
--   order is unspecified, and duplicates may exist.
--   
--   <h1>Note</h1>
--   
--   You will need to specify what manner of list-like structure you want;
--   we have arranged the type signature to make specifying this easy with
--   <tt>TypeApplications</tt>.
pkeys :: forall (ell :: (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (t :: (S -> Type) -> (S -> Type) -> S -> Type) (k :: S -> Type) (v :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PInner (t k v) ~ PAssocMap k v, PListLike ell, PElemConstraint ell (PAsData k)) => Term s (t k v :--> ell (PAsData k))
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PAssocMap k v s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PAssocMap k v s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v s)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PAssocMap k v)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v)
instance (PlutusTx.IsData.Class.ToData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell k), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.ToData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell v), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.FromData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell k), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.FromData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell v)) => Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData k, Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData v, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow k, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow v) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PAssocMap k v)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData k, Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData v, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow k, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow v) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData k, Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData v, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow k, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow v) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd k, Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData k, Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData k), Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData v)) => Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v))
instance (Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData k), Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData v)) => Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v))
instance (Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData k, Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData v) => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PAssocMap k v)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData k, Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData v, Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd k, Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData k) => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData k, Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData v) => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PAssocMap k v)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PSortedMap k v)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.AssocMap.PUnsortedMap k v)


-- | This module is meant to be imported qualified, as some of its
--   identifiers clash with the Plutarch prelude, as well as other parts of
--   the Plutarch API.
module Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval

data PInterval (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PInterval :: Term s (PLowerBound a) -> Term s (PUpperBound a) -> PInterval (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)

[pinterval'from] :: PInterval (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S) -> Term s (PLowerBound a)

[pinterval'to] :: PInterval (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S) -> Term s (PUpperBound a)

data PLowerBound (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PLowerBound :: Term s (PExtended a) -> Term s (PAsData PBool) -> PLowerBound (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)

data PUpperBound (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PUpperBound :: Term s (PExtended a) -> Term s (PAsData PBool) -> PUpperBound (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)

data PExtended (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PNegInf :: PExtended (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PFinite :: Term s (PAsData a) -> PExtended (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PPosInf :: PExtended (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)

-- | Given <tt>x</tt>, create the interval <tt>[x, x]</tt>.
psingleton :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PAsData a :--> PInterval a)

-- | Given <tt>x</tt>, create the interval <tt>[x, +infty)</tt>
pfrom :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PAsData a :--> PInterval a)

-- | Given <tt>x</tt>, create the interval <tt>(-infty, x]</tt>.
pto :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PAsData a :--> PInterval a)

-- | Create the unbounded interval <tt>(-infty, +infty)</tt>.
punbounded :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (FromData (AsHaskell a), ToData (AsHaskell a)) => Term s (PInterval a)

-- | <tt><a>pinterval</a> x y</tt> creates the interval <tt>[x, y]</tt>.
pinterval :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PAsData a :--> (PAsData a :--> PInterval a))

-- | Turn a <a>PLowerBound</a> into a single inclusive bounding value.
pinclusiveLowerBound :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData a, PCountable a) => Term s (PLowerBound a :--> PExtended a)

-- | Turn a <a>PUpperBound</a> into a single inclusive bounding value.
pinclusiveUpperBound :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData a, PEnumerable a) => Term s (PUpperBound a :--> PExtended a)

-- | Check if a value is inside the given interval.
pmember :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData a, PEnumerable a) => Term s (PAsData a :--> (PInterval a :--> PBool))

-- | <tt><a>pcontains</a> # i1 # i2</tt> is true if <tt>i2</tt> is entirely
--   contained in <tt>i1</tt>: more specifically, if for any <tt>s</tt>, if
--   <tt><a>pmember</a> # s # i2</tt>, then <tt><a>pmember</a> # s #
--   i1</tt>.
pcontains :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData a, PEnumerable a) => Term s (PInterval a :--> (PInterval a :--> PBool))

-- | <tt><tt>before</tt> x i</tt> is true if <tt>x</tt> is earlier than the
--   start of <tt>i</tt>.
pbefore :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd a, PIsData a) => Term s (a :--> (PInterval a :--> PBool))

-- | <tt><tt>after</tt> x u</tt> is true if <tt>x</tt> is later than the
--   end of <tt>i</tt>.
pafter :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd a, PIsData a) => Term s (a :--> (PInterval a :--> PBool))

-- | Check if a <a>PInterval</a> is empty.
pisEmpty :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (PIsData a, PEnumerable a) => Term s (PInterval a :--> PBool)

-- | <tt><a>phull</a> i1 i2</tt> gives the smallest interval that contains
--   both <tt>i1</tt> and <tt>i2</tt>.
phull :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd a, PIsData a) => Term s (PInterval a :--> (PInterval a :--> PInterval a))

-- | <tt><a>pintersection</a> i1 i2</tt> gives the largest interval that is
--   contained in both <tt>i1</tt> and <tt>i2</tt>.
pintersection :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). (POrd a, PIsData a) => Term s (PInterval a :--> (PInterval a :--> PInterval a))
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a s)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Enum.PEnumerable a) => Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Enum.PCountable a) => Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Enum.PEnumerable a) => Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a)
instance (PlutusTx.IsData.Class.FromData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.ToData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a)) => Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a)
instance (PlutusTx.IsData.Class.FromData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.ToData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a)) => Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a)
instance (PlutusTx.IsData.Class.FromData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.ToData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a)) => Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a)
instance (PlutusTx.IsData.Class.FromData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.ToData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a)) => Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd a, Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a) => Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Enum.PCountable a) => Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Enum.PEnumerable a) => Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow a) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow a) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow a) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a)
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow a) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData a) => Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a))
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData a) => Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a))
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData a) => Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a))
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData a) => Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a))
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData a => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData a => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData a => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData a => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PExtended a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PInterval a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PLowerBound a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Interval.PUpperBound a)


-- | Useful tools that aren't part of the Plutarch API per se, but get used
--   in multiple places.
module Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils

data PMaybeData (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PDJust :: Term s (PAsData a) -> PMaybeData (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)
PDNothing :: PMaybeData (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S)

-- | A Rational type that corresponds to the data encoding used by
--   <a>Rational</a>.
data PRationalData (s :: S)
PRationalData :: Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> Term s (PAsData PPositive) -> PRationalData (s :: S)
[prationalData'numerator] :: PRationalData (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PInteger)
[prationalData'denominator] :: PRationalData (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PPositive)

-- | Scott-encoded boolean.
data PSBool (s :: S)
PSTrue :: PSBool (s :: S)
PSFalse :: PSBool (s :: S)

-- | Extracts the element out of a <a>PDJust</a> and throws an error if its
--   argument is <a>PDNothing</a>.
pfromDJust :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData a => Term s (PMaybeData a :--> a)

-- | Yield <a>PTrue</a> if a given <a>PMaybeData</a> is of the form
--   <tt><a>PDJust</a> _</tt>.
pisDJust :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PMaybeData a :--> PBool)

-- | Special version of <tt>pmaybe</tt> that works with <a>PMaybeData</a>.
pmaybeData :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData a => Term s (b :--> ((a :--> b) :--> (PMaybeData a :--> b)))

-- | Construct a <a>PDJust</a> value.
pdjust :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData a => Term s (a :--> PMaybeData a)

-- | Construct a <a>PDNothing</a> value.
pdnothing :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s (PMaybeData a)

-- | Construct a <a>PMaybeData</a> given a <a>PMaybe</a>. Could be useful
--   if you want to "lift" from <a>PMaybe</a> to <a>Maybe</a>.
pmaybeToMaybeData :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData a => Term s (PMaybe a :--> PMaybeData a)

-- | Inverse of <a>pmaybeToMaybeData</a>
pmaybeDataToMaybe :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData a => Term s (PMaybeData a :--> PMaybe a)

-- | Extract the value stored in a <a>PMaybeData</a> container. If there's
--   no value, throw an error with the given message.
passertPDJust :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PIsData a => Term s (PString :--> (PMaybeData a :--> a))

pmapMaybeData :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (b :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s ((PAsData a :--> PAsData b) :--> (PMaybeData a :--> PMaybeData b))

prationalFromData :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PRationalData :--> PRational)

-- | Strict version of <a>pmatch</a> for <a>PSBool</a>.
pmatchStrict :: forall (r :: S -> Type) (s :: S). Term s PSBool -> (PSBool s -> Term s r) -> Term s r

pstrue :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSBool

psfalse :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSBool

-- | Lazy <tt>if</tt> on Scott-encoded bool.
psif :: forall (s :: S) (a :: S -> Type). Term s PSBool -> Term s a -> Term s a -> Term s a

-- | Strict <tt>if</tt> on Scott-encoded bool.
psif' :: forall (s :: S) (a :: S -> Type). Term s PSBool -> Term s a -> Term s a -> Term s a

-- | <tt>not</tt> on Scott-encoded bool.
psnot :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool

-- | Lazy AND on Scott-encoded bool.
psand :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool

-- | Strict AND on Scott-encoded bool.
psand' :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool

-- | Lazy OR on Scott-encoded bool
psor :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool

-- | Strict OR on Scott-encoded bool.
psor' :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool -> Term s PSBool
instance GHC.Classes.Eq (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PSBool s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData s)
instance GHC.Classes.Ord (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PSBool s)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData
instance (PlutusTx.IsData.Class.ToData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a), PlutusTx.IsData.Class.FromData (Plutarch.Internal.Lift.AsHaskell a)) => Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd a) => Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Ord.POrd Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData
instance (Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData a, Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow a) => Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData a => Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a))
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData a => Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PMaybeData a)
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PRationalData
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PSBool
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PSBoolRaw a)
instance GHC.Show.Show (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Utils.PSBool s)

module Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value

-- | Represents Values without any guarantees.
--   
--   Values of this type may be unsorted, have duplicate keys, contain
--   empty token maps, and include entries with zero token quantities.
newtype PRawValue (s :: S)
PRawValue :: Term s (PUnsortedMap PCurrencySymbol (PUnsortedMap PTokenName PInteger)) -> PRawValue (s :: S)

-- | Represents sorted, well-formed Values without empty token maps.
--   
--   Duplicate currency symbols or duplicate token names within the same
--   token map are not allowed (since wip).
--   
--   Compared to <a>PRawValue</a>, this type provides stronger guarantees,
--   though <a>PSortedValue</a>s may still contain entries with zero token
--   quantities.
data PSortedValue (s :: S)

-- | Represents sorted, well-formed Values with a mandatory Ada entry.
--   
--   Duplicate currency symbols or duplicate token names within the same
--   token map are not allowed (since wip).
--   
--   Like <a>PSortedValue</a>, but requires the presence of an Ada entry,
--   which may have a zero quantity. Values of this type may still contain
--   entries with zero token quantities.
data PLedgerValue (s :: S)

newtype PCurrencySymbol (s :: S)
PCurrencySymbol :: Term s PByteString -> PCurrencySymbol (s :: S)

newtype PTokenName (s :: S)
PTokenName :: Term s PByteString -> PTokenName (s :: S)

newtype PLovelace (s :: S)
PLovelace :: Term s PInteger -> PLovelace (s :: S)

newtype PAssetClass (s :: S)
PAssetClass :: Term s (PBuiltinPair (PAsData PCurrencySymbol) (PAsData PTokenName)) -> PAssetClass (s :: S)

-- | Construct an empty <a>PRawValue</a>.
pemptyRawValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s PRawValue

-- | Construct a singleton <a>PRawValue</a> containing only the given
--   quantity of the given currency.
psingletonRawValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PCurrencySymbol :--> (PTokenName :--> (PInteger :--> PRawValue)))

-- | Construct a singleton <a>PRawValue</a> containing only the given
--   quantity of the given currency, taking data-encoded parameters.
psingletonRawValueData :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PAsData PCurrencySymbol :--> (PAsData PTokenName :--> (PAsData PInteger :--> PRawValue)))

-- | Construct an empty <a>PSortedValue</a>.
pemptySortedValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSortedValue

-- | Construct a singleton <a>PSortedValue</a> containing only the given
--   quantity of the given currency.
psingletonSortedValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PCurrencySymbol :--> (PTokenName :--> (PInteger :--> PSortedValue)))

-- | Like <a>psingletonSortedValue</a>, but accepts data-encoded arguments.
psingletonSortedValueData :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PAsData PCurrencySymbol :--> (PAsData PTokenName :--> (PAsData PInteger :--> PSortedValue)))

-- | Construct an empty <a>PLedgerValue</a> with a mandatory zero Ada
--   entry.
pemptyLedgerValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s PLedgerValue

-- | Construct a singleton <a>PLedgerValue</a> containing the given
--   quantity of the given currency, together with a mandatory Ada entry
--   (which may be zero).
psingletonLedgerValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PCurrencySymbol :--> (PTokenName :--> (PInteger :--> PLedgerValue)))

-- | Like <a>psingletonLedgerValue</a>, but accepts data-encoded arguments.
psingletonLedgerValueData :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PAsData PCurrencySymbol :--> (PAsData PTokenName :--> (PAsData PInteger :--> PLedgerValue)))

-- | The <a>PCurrencySymbol</a> of the Ada currency.
padaSymbol :: forall (s :: S). Term s PCurrencySymbol

-- | Data-encoded <a>PCurrencySymbol</a> of the Ada currency.
padaSymbolData :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PAsData PCurrencySymbol)

-- | The <a>PTokenName</a> of the Ada currency.
padaToken :: forall (s :: S). Term s PTokenName

-- | Attempt to promote a <a>PRawValue</a> to <a>PSortedValue</a>.
--   
--   The conversion succeeds only if the input Value is already sorted and
--   does not contain empty token maps. Otherwise, the function fails with
--   an error.

-- | <i>Deprecated: Use ppromoteToSortedValue instead</i>
passertSorted :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PRawValue :--> PSortedValue)

-- | Attempt to promote a <a>PRawValue</a> to <a>PSortedValue</a>.
--   
--   The conversion succeeds only if the input Value is already sorted and
--   does not contain empty token maps. Otherwise, the function fails with
--   an error.
ppromoteToSortedValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PRawValue :--> PSortedValue)

-- | Safely demote a <a>PSortedValue</a> to a <a>PRawValue</a>.
pforgetSorted :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSortedValue -> Term s PRawValue

-- | Convert a <a>PSortedValue</a> to a <a>PLedgerValue</a>, inserting the
--   mandatory Ada entry if missing.
ptoLedgerValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> PLedgerValue)

-- | Mimics the <tt>lt</tt> operation on <tt>plutus-ledger-api</tt>'s
--   <tt>Value</tt>.
plt :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSortedValue -> Term s PSortedValue -> Term s PBool

-- | Mimics the <tt>leq</tt> operation on <tt>plutus-ledger-api</tt>'s
--   <tt>Value</tt>.
pleq :: forall (s :: S). Term s PSortedValue -> Term s PSortedValue -> Term s PBool

-- | Given a description of a relation on amounts, check whether that
--   relation holds over <a>PSortedValue</a>s.
--   
--   <h1>Important note</h1>
--   
--   This is intended for use with boolean comparison functions, which must
--   define at least a partial order (total orders and equivalences are
--   acceptable as well). Use of this with anything else is not guaranteed
--   to give anything resembling a sensible answer. Use with extreme care.
pcheckBinRel :: forall (s :: S). Term s ((PInteger :--> (PInteger :--> PBool)) :--> (PSortedValue :--> (PSortedValue :--> PBool)))

-- | Combine two <a>PSortedValue</a>s, taking the tokens from the left
--   only, if a currency occurs on both sides.
pleftBiasedCurrencyUnion :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> (PSortedValue :--> PSortedValue))

-- | Combine two <a>PSortedValue</a>s, taking the tokens from the left
--   only, if a token name of the same currency occurs on both sides.
pleftBiasedTokenUnion :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> (PSortedValue :--> PSortedValue))

-- | Combine two <a>PSortedValue</a>s applying the given function to any
--   pair of quantities with the same asset class.
punionWith :: forall (s :: S). Term s ((PInteger :--> (PInteger :--> PInteger)) :--> (PSortedValue :--> (PSortedValue :--> PSortedValue)))

-- | Combine two <a>PSortedValue</a>s applying the given function to any
--   pair of data-encoded quantities with the same asset class.
punionWithData :: forall (s :: S). Term s ((PAsData PInteger :--> (PAsData PInteger :--> PAsData PInteger)) :--> (PSortedValue :--> (PSortedValue :--> PSortedValue)))

-- | Get the quantity of the given currency in the <a>PSortedValue</a>.
pvalueOf :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> (PCurrencySymbol :--> (PTokenName :--> PInteger)))

-- | Get the amount of Lovelace in the <a>PSortedValue</a>.
plovelaceValueOf :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> PInteger)

-- | Test if the <a>PSortedValue</a> contains nothing except an Ada entry.
--   
--   <h1>Note</h1>
--   
--   This function does not verify that Ada is positive and may return
--   <a>PTrue</a> for zero or negative Ada amounts.
pisAdaOnlyValue :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> PBool)

-- | Check if the given Value contains zero token quantities.
phasZeroTokenQuantities :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PRawValue :--> PBool)

-- | Check if the given <a>PSortedValue</a> contains an ADA entry (can be
--   zero).
phasAdaEntry :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> PBool)

-- | Check if the given <a>PSortedValue</a> has a zero ADA entry.
phasZeroAdaEntry :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> PBool)

-- | Ensure that the given <a>PSortedValue</a> contains an Ada entry. If
--   missing, a zero Ada entry is inserted at the head of the underlying
--   sorted map.
pinsertAdaEntry :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> PSortedValue)

-- | Normalize the argument to contain no Ada entries and no zero token
--   quantities.
pnormalizeNoAdaNonZeroTokens :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PSortedValue :--> PSortedValue)
pmapAmounts :: forall (s :: S). Term s ((PInteger :--> PInteger) :--> (PRawValue :--> PRawValue))
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue s)
instance PlutusTx.Monoid.Group (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue)
instance PlutusTx.Monoid.Group (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue)
instance PlutusTx.Monoid.Monoid (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue)
instance PlutusTx.Monoid.Monoid (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue)
instance GHC.Base.Monoid (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue)
instance GHC.Base.Monoid (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Semigroup.PMonoid Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Semigroup.PMonoid Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Semigroup.PSemigroup Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Semigroup.PSemigroup Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PRawValue
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue
instance PlutusTx.Semigroup.Semigroup (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue)
instance PlutusTx.Semigroup.Semigroup (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue)
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PLedgerValue)
instance GHC.Base.Semigroup (Plutarch.Internal.Term.Term s Plutarch.LedgerApi.Value.PSortedValue)

module Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts

newtype PColdCommitteeCredential (s :: S)
PColdCommitteeCredential :: Term s PCredential -> PColdCommitteeCredential (s :: S)

newtype PHotCommitteeCredential (s :: S)
PHotCommitteeCredential :: Term s PCredential -> PHotCommitteeCredential (s :: S)

newtype PDRepCredential (s :: S)
PDRepCredential :: Term s PCredential -> PDRepCredential (s :: S)

data PDRep (s :: S)
PDRep :: Term s (PAsData PDRepCredential) -> PDRep (s :: S)
PDRepAlwaysAbstain :: PDRep (s :: S)
PDRepAlwaysNoConfidence :: PDRep (s :: S)

data PDelegatee (s :: S)
PDelegStake :: Term s (PAsData PPubKeyHash) -> PDelegatee (s :: S)
PDelegVote :: Term s PDRep -> PDelegatee (s :: S)
PDelegStakeVote :: Term s (PAsData PPubKeyHash) -> Term s PDRep -> PDelegatee (s :: S)

data PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertRegStaking :: Term s PCredential -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace) -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertUnRegStaking :: Term s PCredential -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace) -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertDelegStaking :: Term s PCredential -> Term s PDelegatee -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertRegDeleg :: Term s PCredential -> Term s PDelegatee -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace) -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertRegDRep :: Term s PDRepCredential -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace) -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertUpdateDRep :: Term s PDRepCredential -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertUnRegDRep :: Term s PDRepCredential -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace) -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertPoolRegister :: Term s (PAsData PPubKeyHash) -> Term s (PAsData PPubKeyHash) -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertPoolRetire :: Term s (PAsData PPubKeyHash) -> Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertAuthHotCommittee :: Term s PColdCommitteeCredential -> Term s PHotCommitteeCredential -> PTxCert (s :: S)
PTxCertResignColdCommittee :: Term s PColdCommitteeCredential -> PTxCert (s :: S)

data PVoter (s :: S)
PCommitteeVoter :: Term s PHotCommitteeCredential -> PVoter (s :: S)
PDRepVoter :: Term s PDRepCredential -> PVoter (s :: S)
PStakePoolVoter :: Term s (PAsData PPubKeyHash) -> PVoter (s :: S)

data PVote (s :: S)
PVoteYes :: PVote (s :: S)
PVoteNo :: PVote (s :: S)
PAbstain :: PVote (s :: S)

data PGovernanceActionId (s :: S)
PGovernanceActionId :: Term s (PAsData PTxId) -> Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> PGovernanceActionId (s :: S)

data PCommittee (s :: S)
PCommittee :: Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PColdCommitteeCredential PInteger)) -> Term s PRationalData -> PCommittee (s :: S)
[pcommittee'members] :: PCommittee (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PColdCommitteeCredential PInteger))
[pcommittee'quorum] :: PCommittee (s :: S) -> Term s PRationalData

-- | A constitution, omitting the optional anchor.
newtype PConstitution (s :: S)
PConstitution :: Term s (PMaybeData PScriptHash) -> PConstitution (s :: S)

data PProtocolVersion (s :: S)
PProtocolVersion :: Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> PProtocolVersion (s :: S)
[pprotocolVersion'major] :: PProtocolVersion (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PInteger)
[pprotocolVersion'minor] :: PProtocolVersion (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PInteger)

newtype PChangedParameters (s :: S)
PChangedParameters :: Term s PData -> PChangedParameters (s :: S)

data PGovernanceAction (s :: S)
PParameterChange :: Term s (PMaybeData PGovernanceActionId) -> Term s PChangedParameters -> Term s (PMaybeData PScriptHash) -> PGovernanceAction (s :: S)
PHardForkInitiation :: Term s (PMaybeData PGovernanceActionId) -> Term s PProtocolVersion -> PGovernanceAction (s :: S)
PTreasuryWithdrawals :: Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PCredential PLovelace)) -> Term s (PMaybeData PScriptHash) -> PGovernanceAction (s :: S)
PNoConfidence :: Term s (PMaybeData PGovernanceActionId) -> PGovernanceAction (s :: S)
PUpdateCommittee :: Term s (PMaybeData PGovernanceActionId) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PColdCommitteeCredential))) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PColdCommitteeCredential PInteger)) -> Term s PRationalData -> PGovernanceAction (s :: S)
PNewConstitution :: Term s (PMaybeData PGovernanceActionId) -> Term s PConstitution -> PGovernanceAction (s :: S)
PInfoAction :: PGovernanceAction (s :: S)

data PProposalProcedure (s :: S)
PProposalProcedure :: Term s (PAsData PLovelace) -> Term s PCredential -> Term s PGovernanceAction -> PProposalProcedure (s :: S)
[pproposalProcedure'deposit] :: PProposalProcedure (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace)
[pproposalProcedure'returnAddr] :: PProposalProcedure (s :: S) -> Term s PCredential
[pproposalProcedure'governanceAction] :: PProposalProcedure (s :: S) -> Term s PGovernanceAction

data PScriptPurpose (s :: S)
PMinting :: Term s (PAsData PCurrencySymbol) -> PScriptPurpose (s :: S)
PSpending :: Term s PTxOutRef -> PScriptPurpose (s :: S)

PRewarding :: Term s PCredential -> PScriptPurpose (s :: S)
PCertifying :: Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> Term s PTxCert -> PScriptPurpose (s :: S)

PVoting :: Term s PVoter -> PScriptPurpose (s :: S)

PProposing :: Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> Term s PProposalProcedure -> PScriptPurpose (s :: S)

data PScriptInfo (s :: S)
PMintingScript :: Term s (PAsData PCurrencySymbol) -> PScriptInfo (s :: S)
PSpendingScript :: Term s PTxOutRef -> Term s (PMaybeData PDatum) -> PScriptInfo (s :: S)
PRewardingScript :: Term s PCredential -> PScriptInfo (s :: S)
PCertifyingScript :: Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> Term s PTxCert -> PScriptInfo (s :: S)
PVotingScript :: Term s PVoter -> PScriptInfo (s :: S)
PProposingScript :: Term s (PAsData PInteger) -> Term s PProposalProcedure -> PScriptInfo (s :: S)

-- | An input of the transaction.
data PTxInInfo (s :: S)
PTxInInfo :: Term s PTxOutRef -> Term s PTxOut -> PTxInInfo (s :: S)
[ptxInInfo'outRef] :: PTxInInfo (s :: S) -> Term s PTxOutRef
[ptxInInfo'resolved] :: PTxInInfo (s :: S) -> Term s PTxOut
data PTxInfo (s :: S)
PTxInfo :: Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo))) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo))) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxOut))) -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace) -> Term s (PAsData PMintValue) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxCert))) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PCredential PLovelace)) -> Term s (PInterval PPosixTime) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PPubKeyHash))) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PScriptPurpose PRedeemer)) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PDatumHash PDatum)) -> Term s (PAsData PTxId) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PVoter (PUnsortedMap PGovernanceActionId PVote))) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PProposalProcedure))) -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace) -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace) -> PTxInfo (s :: S)
[ptxInfo'inputs] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo)))
[ptxInfo'referenceInputs] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo)))
[ptxInfo'outputs] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxOut)))
[ptxInfo'fee] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace)
[ptxInfo'mint] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PMintValue)
[ptxInfo'txCerts] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxCert)))
[ptxInfo'wdrl] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PCredential PLovelace))
[ptxInfo'validRange] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PInterval PPosixTime)
[ptxInfo'signatories] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PPubKeyHash)))
[ptxInfo'redeemers] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PScriptPurpose PRedeemer))
[ptxInfo'data] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PDatumHash PDatum))
[ptxInfo'id] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PTxId)
[ptxInfo'votes] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PVoter (PUnsortedMap PGovernanceActionId PVote)))
[ptxInfo'proposalProcedures] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PProposalProcedure)))
[ptxInfo'currentTreasuryAmount] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace)
[ptxInfo'treasuryDonation] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace)

data PScriptContext (s :: S)
PScriptContext :: Term s PTxInfo -> Term s PRedeemer -> Term s PScriptInfo -> PScriptContext (s :: S)
[pscriptContext'txInfo] :: PScriptContext (s :: S) -> Term s PTxInfo
[pscriptContext'redeemer] :: PScriptContext (s :: S) -> Term s PRedeemer
[pscriptContext'scriptInfo] :: PScriptContext (s :: S) -> Term s PScriptInfo

-- | Find the input currently being validated.
pfindOwnInput :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PScriptContext :--> PMaybe PTxInInfo)

-- | Find the datum corresponding to a datum hash, if there is one.
pfindDatum :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PDatumHash :--> (PTxInfo :--> PMaybe PDatum))

-- | Find the hash of a datum if it's part of the pending transaction's
--   hashes.
pfindDatumHash :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PDatum :--> (PTxInfo :--> PMaybe PDatumHash))

-- | Lookup up the datum given the datum hash.
--   
--   Takes as argument the datum assoc list from a <a>PTxInfo</a>.
--   Validates the datum using <a>PTryFrom</a>.
--   
--   <b>Example:</b>
--   
--   <pre>
--   pparseDatum <tt>MyType # datumHash #$ pfield </tt>"datums" # txinfo
--   
--   </pre>
pparseDatum :: forall (a :: S -> Type) (s :: S). PTryFrom PData (PAsData a) => Term s (PDatumHash :--> (PUnsortedMap PDatumHash PDatum :--> PMaybe (PAsData a)))

-- | Given a UTXO reference and a transaction (<a>PTxInfo</a>), resolve it
--   to one of the transaction's inputs (<a>PTxInInfo</a>). If no matching
--   input exists, the result is <a>PNothing</a>.
--   
--   <h1>NOTE</h1>
--   
--   This only searches the true transaction inputs and not the referenced
--   transaction inputs.
pfindTxInByTxOutRef :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PTxOutRef :--> (PTxInfo :--> PMaybe PTxInInfo))

-- | Find the indices of all the outputs that pay to the same script
--   address we are currently spending from, if any.
pfindContinuingOutputs :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PScriptContext :--> PBuiltinList PInteger)

-- | Get all the outputs that pay to the same script address we are
--   currently spending from, if any.
pgetContinuingOutputs :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PScriptContext :--> PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxOut))

-- | Check if a transaction was signed by the given public key.
ptxSignedBy :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PTxInfo :--> (PPubKeyHash :--> PBool))

-- | Get the Values paid to a public key address by a pending transaction.
ppubKeyOutputsAt :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PPubKeyHash :--> (PTxInfo :--> PBuiltinList (PAsData PLedgerValue)))

-- | Get the total value paid to a public key address by a pending
--   transaction.
pvaluePaidTo :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PTxInfo :--> (PPubKeyHash :--> PLedgerValue))
pvalueSpent :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PTxInfo :--> PLedgerValue)
pvalueProduced :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PTxInfo :--> PLedgerValue)

-- | Get the <tt>PCurrencySymbol</tt> of the current minting policy script.
pownCurrencySymbol :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PScriptContext :--> PMaybe PCurrencySymbol)

-- | Check if the pending transaction spends a specific transaction output
--   (identified by the hash of a transaction and an index into that
--   transactions' outputs)
pspendsOutput :: forall (s :: S). Term s (PTxInfo :--> (PTxId :--> (PInteger :--> PBool)))
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote s)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote s)
instance Generics.SOP.Universe.Generic (Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter s)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote
instance Plutarch.Internal.Eq.PEq Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote
instance Plutarch.Internal.IsData.PIsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote
instance Plutarch.Internal.Lift.PLiftable Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote
instance Plutarch.Internal.Show.PShow Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential)
instance Plutarch.Internal.TryFrom.PTryFrom Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PData (Plutarch.Builtin.Data.PAsData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential)
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote
instance Plutarch.Internal.Parse.PValidateData Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PChangedParameters
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PColdCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PCommittee
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PConstitution
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRep
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDRepCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PDelegatee
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceAction
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PGovernanceActionId
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PHotCommitteeCredential
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProposalProcedure
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PProtocolVersion
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptContext
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PScriptPurpose
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxCert
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PTxInfo
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVote
instance Plutarch.Internal.PlutusType.PlutusType Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3.Contexts.PVoter


-- | <h1>Note</h1>
--   
--   The <a>PValue</a>, <a>PMap</a> and <a>PInterval</a>-related
--   functionality can be found in other modules, as these clash with the
--   Plutarch prelude. These should be imported qualified.
module Plutarch.LedgerApi.V3

data PScriptContext (s :: S)
PScriptContext :: Term s PTxInfo -> Term s PRedeemer -> Term s PScriptInfo -> PScriptContext (s :: S)
[pscriptContext'txInfo] :: PScriptContext (s :: S) -> Term s PTxInfo
[pscriptContext'redeemer] :: PScriptContext (s :: S) -> Term s PRedeemer
[pscriptContext'scriptInfo] :: PScriptContext (s :: S) -> Term s PScriptInfo
data PTxInfo (s :: S)
PTxInfo :: Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo))) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo))) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxOut))) -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace) -> Term s (PAsData PMintValue) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxCert))) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PCredential PLovelace)) -> Term s (PInterval PPosixTime) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PPubKeyHash))) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PScriptPurpose PRedeemer)) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PDatumHash PDatum)) -> Term s (PAsData PTxId) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PVoter (PUnsortedMap PGovernanceActionId PVote))) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PProposalProcedure))) -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace) -> Term s (PMaybeData PLovelace) -> PTxInfo (s :: S)
[ptxInfo'inputs] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo)))
[ptxInfo'referenceInputs] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxInInfo)))
[ptxInfo'outputs] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxOut)))
[ptxInfo'fee] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PLovelace)
[ptxInfo'mint] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PMintValue)
[ptxInfo'txCerts] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PTxCert)))
[ptxInfo'wdrl] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PCredential PLovelace))
[ptxInfo'validRange] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PInterval PPosixTime)
[ptxInfo'signatories] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PBuiltinList (PAsData PPubKeyHash)))
[ptxInfo'redeemers] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PScriptPurpose PRedeemer))
[ptxInfo'data] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PDatumHash PDatum))
[ptxInfo'id] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData PTxId)
[ptxInfo'votes] :: PTxInfo (s :: S) -> Term s (PAsData (PUnsortedMap PVoter (PUnsortedMap PGovernanceActionId PVote)))
